question: How many tracks are there in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track

question: List the names of all music genres.
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Genre

question: How many customers does the store have?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer

question: What are the first and last names of all customers from Brazil?
gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Brazil'

question: What is the name of the single longest track by duration?
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many employees work for the company?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee

question: List the distinct billing countries that appear on invoices.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT BillingCountry FROM Invoice

question: How many albums are in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album

question: What is the highest unit price of any track?
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(UnitPrice) FROM Track

question: List the invoice IDs and totals of all invoices with a total over 20 dollars.
gold_sql: SELECT InvoiceId, Total FROM Invoice WHERE Total > 20

question: How many customers have no company listed?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer WHERE Company IS NULL

question: What are the names of all playlists?
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Playlist

question: List the first and last names of employees whose title is 'Sales Support Agent'.
gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Employee WHERE Title = 'Sales Support Agent'

question: How many tracks are longer than 10 minutes?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Milliseconds > 600000

question: What is the average invoice total?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(Total) FROM Invoice

question: List the names of tracks whose composer is exactly 'Jimi Hendrix'.
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE Composer = 'Jimi Hendrix'

question: What distinct cities do our customers in France live in?
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT City FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'France'

question: How many albums does the artist Iron Maiden have?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album al JOIN Artist ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId WHERE ar.Name = 'Iron Maiden'

question: Which 5 artists have the most albums? Show each artist's name and album count, most albums first.
gold_sql: SELECT ar.Name, COUNT(*) AS AlbumCount FROM Artist ar JOIN Album al ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY AlbumCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many tracks are there in each genre? Show the genre name and the track count.
gold_sql: SELECT g.Name, COUNT(*) FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.GenreId

question: What are the top 5 billing countries by total invoice sales? Show the country and the total, highest first.
gold_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) AS Total FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY Total DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which employee supports the most customers? Show their first name, last name, and how many customers they support.
gold_sql: SELECT e.FirstName, e.LastName, COUNT(*) AS N FROM Employee e JOIN Customer c ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId ORDER BY N DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the titles of all albums by the artist AC/DC.
gold_sql: SELECT al.Title FROM Album al JOIN Artist ar ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId WHERE ar.Name = 'AC/DC'

question: Who are the top 5 customers by total amount spent? Show first name, last name, and total spent, highest first.
gold_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS Spent FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY Spent DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many invoices were issued in each calendar year? Show the year and the count.
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS Year, COUNT(*) FROM Invoice GROUP BY Year

question: How many tracks are on the album titled 'Let There Be Rock'?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track t JOIN Album al ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId WHERE al.Title = 'Let There Be Rock'

question: Which genres have more than 100 tracks? Show the genre name and its track count.
gold_sql: SELECT g.Name, COUNT(*) AS N FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.GenreId HAVING N > 100

question: List the first and last names of the customers whose support rep is the employee Jane Peacock.
gold_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName FROM Customer c JOIN Employee e ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId WHERE e.FirstName = 'Jane' AND e.LastName = 'Peacock'

question: Which genre generated the most sales revenue? Show the genre name and the revenue.
gold_sql: SELECT g.Name, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS Rev FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId GROUP BY g.GenreId ORDER BY Rev DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total sales revenue for each media type? Show the media type name and revenue, highest first.
gold_sql: SELECT m.Name, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS Rev FROM MediaType m JOIN Track t ON t.MediaTypeId = m.MediaTypeId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId GROUP BY m.MediaTypeId ORDER BY Rev DESC

question: Which media type has the most tracks? Show its name and the number of tracks.
gold_sql: SELECT m.Name, COUNT(*) AS N FROM MediaType m JOIN Track t ON t.MediaTypeId = m.MediaTypeId GROUP BY m.MediaTypeId ORDER BY N DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which playlists contain more than 100 tracks? Show each playlist's name and its track count. Playlists with duplicate names are separate playlists.
gold_sql: SELECT p.Name, COUNT(*) AS N FROM Playlist p JOIN PlaylistTrack pt ON pt.PlaylistId = p.PlaylistId GROUP BY p.PlaylistId HAVING N > 100

question: What are the top 5 countries by number of customers? Show the country and the customer count, highest first.
gold_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS N FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY N DESC LIMIT 5

question: For every employee who has a manager, list the employee's first name, the employee's last name, and their manager's last name.
gold_sql: SELECT e.FirstName, e.LastName, m.LastName FROM Employee e JOIN Employee m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeId

question: Which album has the longest total playing time across all of its tracks? Show the album title.
gold_sql: SELECT al.Title FROM Album al JOIN Track t ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId GROUP BY al.AlbumId ORDER BY SUM(t.Milliseconds) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many invoices were issued in the year 2010, and what was their combined total value?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2010'

question: How many tracks are in the playlist named exactly 'Classical'?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PlaylistTrack pt JOIN Playlist p ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId WHERE p.Name = 'Classical'

question: Which 3 artists have generated the most sales revenue? Show the artist name and the revenue, highest first.
gold_sql: SELECT ar.Name, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS Rev FROM Artist ar JOIN Album al ON al.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY Rev DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which single customer spent the most money in the year 2011? Show their first name, last name, and the amount they spent that year.
gold_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS S FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId WHERE strftime('%Y', i.InvoiceDate) = '2011' GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY S DESC LIMIT 1

question: For each sales support agent, what is the total value of all invoices from the customers they support? Show the agent's first name, last name, and the total.
gold_sql: SELECT e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS S FROM Employee e JOIN Customer c ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId JOIN Invoice i ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId

question: How many distinct tracks appear on 5 or more playlists?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT pt.TrackId FROM PlaylistTrack pt GROUP BY pt.TrackId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pt.PlaylistId) >= 5)

question: How many artists have no albums in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Artist WHERE ArtistId NOT IN (SELECT ArtistId FROM Album)

question: How many tracks have never been purchased on any invoice?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE TrackId NOT IN (SELECT TrackId FROM InvoiceLine)

question: What is the average number of tracks per album?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(N) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS N FROM Track GROUP BY AlbumId)

question: Which genre has the highest average track duration? Show only the genre name.
gold_sql: SELECT g.Name FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.GenreId ORDER BY AVG(t.Milliseconds) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the total invoice revenue for each month of 2012? Show the month number (01-12) and the revenue.
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%m', InvoiceDate) AS M, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2012' GROUP BY M

question: Which customers have purchased tracks from more than 8 different genres? Show their first and last names.
gold_sql: SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON il.InvoiceId = i.InvoiceId JOIN Track t ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY c.CustomerId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 8

question: Which album generated the most sales revenue? Show the album title and the revenue.
gold_sql: SELECT al.Title, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS Rev FROM Album al JOIN Track t ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId GROUP BY al.AlbumId ORDER BY Rev DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many albums contain tracks from more than one distinct genre?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT AlbumId FROM Track GROUP BY AlbumId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT GenreId) > 1)

question: What percentage of total invoice revenue came from the USA? Return a single number rounded to two decimal places.
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN BillingCountry = 'USA' THEN Total ELSE 0 END) / SUM(Total), 2) FROM Invoice
